# Q 

2 

M 

SMOOTHIE EVO

## Exterior / Accessories

### Durable, safe, and smooth synthetic wash mitt. Improved design for enhanced performance.

Q²M Smoothie EVO is an improved version of our legendary synthetic wash mitt. It now features a selection of 3 different types of fibres and has a GSM of 1250. An edgeless finish, a practical welt, and functional sewing inside make it an ergonomic tool suitable for every vehicle. Q²M Smoothie EVO glides over the surface, collecting dirt particles in the safest way possible. The washing process feels more “lubricated” and smooth than ever. With the added twist loop fibres, the cleaning power has increased compared to the previous version.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_smoothie-1024x991.jpg)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

Real World Lifespan

>200 washes

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
